date_from.description: Duration in the past. Supported units are: `h` (hour), `d` (day), `w` (week), `m` (month), `y` (year), `all` (all time). Use the `Start` suffix to define the exact left date boundary. Examples: `-1d` last day from now, `-180d` last 180 days from now, `mStart` this month start, `-1dStart` yesterday's start.

filterTestAccounts.description: Exclude internal and test users by applying the respective filters

key.description: Use one of the properties the user has provided in the plan.

operator.description: `icontains` - case insensitive contains. `not_icontains` - case insensitive does not contain. `regex` - matches the regex pattern. `not_regex` - does not match the regex pattern.

value.description: Only use property values from the plan. If the operator is `regex` or `not_regex`, the value must be a valid ClickHouse regex pattern to match against. Otherwise, the value must be a substring that will be matched against the property value. Use the string values `true` or `false` for boolean properties.

retentionFilter.description: Properties specific to the retention insight

cumulative.description: Whether retention should be rolling (aka unbounded, cumulative). Rolling retention means that a user coming back in period 5 makes them count towards all the previous periods.

meanRetentionCalculation.description: Whether an additional series should be shown, showing the mean conversion for each period across cohorts.

period.description: Retention period, the interval to track cohorts by.

retentionReference.description: Whether retention is with regard to initial cohort size, or that of the previous period.

retentionType.description: Retention type: recurring or first time. Recurring retention counts a user as part of a cohort if they performed the cohort event during that time period, irrespective of it was their first time or not. First time retention only counts a user as part of the cohort if it was their first time performing the cohort event.

custom_name.description: Custom name for the event if it is needed to be renamed.
